---
title: "Courses"
description: |
  Explore all the courses offered by Get Learn Bioinformatics. 
listing:
  - id: courses
    max-description-length: 500
    image-height: 150px
    fields: [image, title]
    contents: 
      - course_1
      - course_2
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: false
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

Browse hands-on training, workshops, and research-focused modules in bioinformatics, computational biology, and biomedical research.

::: {#courses}
:::
